final:
module RefModule(
    input [3:0] d,
    input clk,
    input enable,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000; // Reset the register to zero
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d; // Load the data into the register
        end
    end

endmodule
